name: cms-mcp
description: Universal MCP server for any REST-based CMS. Auto-generates 5 schema-driven tools per endpoint (list, get, create, update, delete) from OpenAPI spec or 20-record live introspection with schema merging. CMSAdapter field mapping, SecretManager, CompensatingTransaction rollback, SSRF v2. Optional plugins for approval gate, policy enforcement, semantic search, and GitHub sync.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of your REST API (e.g. https://api.example.com/api)

auth.description: Authentication config. Use env: prefix to read values from environment variables.

token.description: Bearer token or API key. Use env:VAR_NAME.

header.description: Header name for api-key auth (default: X-API-Key)

password.description: Password for HTTP Basic auth. Use env:VAR_NAME.

endpoints.description: Map of endpoint key → path. Each key gets list_X, get_X, create_X, update_X, delete_X tools. The key 'media' is reserved for file upload tools.

adapters.description: Per-endpoint adapter config. Keys must match keys in 'endpoints'.

updateMethod.description: HTTP method for update_X. Use PUT for APIs requiring full-replacement semantics.

fieldMap.description: Bidirectional field name translation. Keys are internal names Claude uses; values are external API field names. Example: { title: post_heading_1 }

legacyMode.description: When true, registers mutate_X (v0.5 combined tool) instead of separate create_X, update_X, delete_X. Use for backward compatibility with saved prompts.

allowedPorts.description: Extra ports allowed in outbound API and media URLs. Ports 80 and 443 are always allowed. Add non-standard ports here: [3000, 8080].

readOnly.description: Disable all write tools (create_X, update_X, delete_X, upload_media_from_url, delete_media) when true.

autoDiscover.description: Auto-probe for OpenAPI spec on startup.

discoveryUrl.description: Override URL for OpenAPI spec (JSON or YAML). Skips 14-path auto-probe.

schemaCache.description: SQLite-backed schema cache. Required for semantic search plugin.

approvals.description: Human approval gate — requires browser click before writes execute.

tools.description: Tool names to gate. Example: [delete_posts, create_posts]. Omit to gate all writes.

policies.description: Path to cms-mcp.policies.json. Enables check_policies and init_policies tools.

embedding.description: OpenAI embedding config for true semantic search. Without this, TF-IDF is used.

github.description: GitHub plugin config. Enables scan_repo, sync_repo_to_project, list_repos tools.

defaultOwner.description: Default GitHub owner/org for repo tools.

auditLog.description: Path for append-only NDJSON audit log. All tool calls are logged with secrets redacted. Use ~/ for home directory.

webhook.description: GitHub webhook listener. Start with --webhook flag.

secret.description: HMAC secret for signature verification. Use env:WEBHOOK_SECRET.

tools.name: list_X
tools.description: List records for endpoint X. Supports limit (default 20, max 100), full-text search, and enum field filters auto-generated from your schema. Replace X with your endpoint key (e.g. list_posts, list_products, list_authors).

tools.name: get_X
tools.description: Fetch a single record by ID from endpoint X. Returns the full JSON record. Field names are reverse-mapped if fieldMap is configured.

tools.name: create_X
tools.description: Create a new record in endpoint X. Add preview: true to see a field table without writing. Add confirm: true to execute the POST. Field names are translated via fieldMap if configured.

confirm.description: Must be true to execute the write

tools.name: update_X
tools.description: Update an existing record in endpoint X by ID. Add preview: true to see a diff without writing. Add confirm: true to apply. Uses PATCH by default; set adapters.X.updateMethod: PUT for full-replacement APIs.

confirm.description: Must be true to execute the write

tools.name: delete_X
tools.description: Permanently delete a record from endpoint X. Shows a warning if confirm is missing. Irreversible — requires confirm: true to execute.

confirm.description: Must be true — deletion is permanent

tools.name: mutate_X
tools.description: [Legacy mode — legacyMode: true only] Create, update, delete, or preview changes to a record in endpoint X. The action param selects the operation. Use create_X, update_X, delete_X by default.

action.description: preview = show diff without writing; create/update/delete require confirm: true

id.description: Record ID — required for update and delete

tools.name: discover_api
tools.description: Probe your API for an OpenAPI/Swagger spec (JSON or YAML) across 14 common paths. Returns discovered resources, endpoint paths, and a suggested endpoints config block.

force_refresh.description: Bypass cache and re-fetch the OpenAPI spec

base_url.description: Override the baseUrl from config for discovery

tools.name: apply_discovered_endpoints
tools.description: Write the endpoints discovered by discover_api into cms-mcp.config.json (merges with existing endpoints). Requires confirm: true.

config_path.description: Path to the cms-mcp.config.json to update

tools.name: inspect_endpoint_schema
tools.description: Show the full schema for a configured endpoint — field names, types, required/optional status, examples. Sources: OpenAPI spec (authoritative) or 20-record live sampling with schema merging.

tools.name: refresh_resource_schema
tools.description: Invalidate the SQLite cache for one endpoint and re-introspect: cache → OpenAPI → 20-record sampling → cold-start. Prompts server restart to apply new tool shapes.

tools.name: list_configured_endpoints
tools.description: Show a table of all configured endpoints with URL, schema source (cache/OpenAPI/sampled/cold-start), field count, and registered tool names.

tools.name: cache_stats
tools.description: Show SQLite schema cache statistics: entry count, TTL, expired count, oldest entry age, size on disk.

tools.name: clear_cache
tools.description: Delete all SQLite schema cache entries. Forces full re-introspection on next startup. Requires confirm: true.

tools.name: upload_media_from_url
tools.description: Download a remote image/file (by URL) and upload it to your CMS media endpoint as multipart/form-data. SSRF-hardened: blocks private IPs, AWS/GCP/Azure metadata (169.254.169.254), port whitelist, null-byte blocking. 50 MB hard cap.

url.description: Public URL of the image or file to upload

folder.description: Destination folder/path in your media library

tools.name: list_media
tools.description: List media files from your CMS media endpoint.

tools.name: delete_media
tools.description: Delete a media asset by ID. Requires confirm: true — irreversible.

confirm.description: Must be true — deletion is permanent

tools.name: semantic_search
tools.description: [Plugin: schemaCache required] Search across all synced content using TF-IDF (default) or OpenAI embeddings. Returns top matches with similarity scores.

type.description: Filter results by endpoint key (e.g. posts, projects)

tools.name: sync_all_content
tools.description: [Plugin: schemaCache required] Fetch all records from every configured endpoint and index them in the vector cache for semantic search.

tools.name: knowledge_status
tools.description: [Plugin: schemaCache required] Show how many records are indexed in the vector cache per endpoint, and when they were last synced.

tools.name: scan_repo
tools.description: [Plugin: github required] Scan a GitHub repository — README, package.json, languages — and extract tech stack, description, and project metadata.

tools.name: sync_repo_to_project
tools.description: [Plugin: github required] Scan a GitHub repo and create or update a CMS project record with the extracted metadata.

tools.name: list_repos
tools.description: [Plugin: github required] List public GitHub repositories for a user or organization.

tools.name: check_policies
tools.description: [Plugin: policies required] Run all configured policy rules against proposed content. Returns violations with field-level detail.

tools.name: init_policies
tools.description: Generate a starter cms-mcp.policies.json with example rules. Requires confirm: true.

output_path.description: Where to write the example policies file

prompts.name: cms-audit
prompts.description: Audit all content in a configured endpoint for quality issues — missing SEO fields, draft posts, broken URLs.

prompts.name: cms-publish-workflow
prompts.description: Run the full publish workflow for a draft record: fetch, review, fill SEO fields, show diff, and publish with approval.

prompts.name: cms-bulk-update
prompts.description: Apply a field update to all records in an endpoint matching a filter.

prompts.name: cms-schema-report
prompts.description: Generate a full schema report for all configured endpoints — field types, required fields, relation hints, inconsistent fields.

prompts.name: cms-github-sync
prompts.description: Scan all public repos for a GitHub user and sync them as project records in your CMS.

arguments.name: endpointKey
arguments.description: CMS endpoint to sync into (default: projects)

resources.name: CMS collection
resources.description: List all records for a configured endpoint. HTML content is distilled to Markdown.

resources.name: CMS record
resources.description: Single record from a configured endpoint, with HTML fields distilled to Markdown.
